name: Fortinet
analysis: FTNT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at $150.0700. Trade idea: entry $149.9300, stop $131.7195, target $204.5615 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
